SEO Content Writer

On-site

Full-time

We seek a Content Writer to research, write, and publish high-quality, SEO-driven content that drives organic traffic and supports Way’s growth in the U.S. market. This writing-first role requires producing content that ranks, reads well, and converts consumers. You’ll create blog posts, web copy, landing pages, and long-form content across product verticals: car wash, parking, gas, insurance, and roadside assistance. Collaboration with the SEO & Content Manager is essential for aligning on editorial priorities, keyword targets, and performance metrics.

Blog & Long-Form Content

  • Maintain consistent publishing cadence per editorial calendar.

Web Copy & Landing Pages

  • Write clear, persuasive, SEO-optimized website copy and landing pages.
  • Craft meta titles, descriptions, and headers to boost click-through rates.
  • Support new page creation and site updates with SEO-informed copy.

SEO Content Execution

  • Collaborate on keyword research, topic clustering, and content briefs.
  • Structure content for on-page SEO (heading hierarchy, internal linking, schema-friendly formatting).
  • Update existing content to improve rankings and relevance.
  • Monitor performance and refine future writing.

Research & Subject Matter Development

  • Develop expertise in Way’s product verticals and U.S. consumer needs.
  • Research competitors, trends, and consumer questions to identify content opportunities.
  • Translate complex topics (insurance, EV charging, parking regulations) into accessible content.

Editorial Quality & Brand Voice

  • Write in a consistent brand voice: clear, helpful, confident.
  • Self-edit rigorously for clarity, grammar, structure, and readability.
  • Incorporate feedback to improve future output.

Preferred Skills

  • 3-5 years of experience as a content writer/copywriter with an SEO-focused portfolio.

What We Look For

  • Clear thinking: simplify complex topics.
  • Ownership: see content through from research to publish.
  • Speed with quality: produce volume without sacrificing craft.

  • Curiosity: dig into topics to understand, not just fill briefs.

This is a writing role, not a management or strategy role. The SEO & Content Manager sets priorities; you execute with high-quality content. If you want to write for millions of U.S. consumers and grow your craft weekly, this is the role.
